name: YAOC2 Sandbox — MISP Enrich + OpenCTI Sync
description: Sandbox workflow for IOC enrichment. Accepts validated parameters from the policy gateway. Searches/creates a MISP event and optionally syncs to OpenCTI. Never receives raw user text.

nodes.name: Validate Parameters (Code)
nodes.notes: Whitelist check: observable_type must be one of [ip, domain, url, hash, email]. observable_value must pass basic regex. Reject if invalid.

nodes.name: Search MISP (HTTP Request)
nodes.notes: POST to {{ $env.MISP_BASE_URL }}/attributes/restSearch. Auth: {{ $env.MISP_API_KEY }}. Body: { value: observable_value, type: observable_type }.

nodes.name: Check MISP Result (Switch)
nodes.notes: If result is empty AND create_event_if_missing === true → create event branch. Else → enrich branch.

nodes.name: Create MISP Event (HTTP Request)
nodes.notes: POST to {{ $env.MISP_BASE_URL }}/events. Creates a new event with the observable as an attribute.

nodes.name: Enrich MISP Event (HTTP Request)
nodes.notes: POST to {{ $env.MISP_BASE_URL }}/attributes/add/<event_id>. Adds attribute to existing event.

nodes.name: Push to OpenCTI? (Switch)
nodes.notes: If push_to_opencti === true → OpenCTI branch. Else → build result.

nodes.name: Sync to OpenCTI (HTTP Request)
nodes.notes: POST GraphQL mutation to {{ $env.OPENCTI_BASE_URL }}/graphql. Creates or updates observable. Auth: Bearer {{ $env.OPENCTI_API_KEY }}.

nodes.name: Build Result (Code)
nodes.notes: Return: { result_summary: string, misp_event_id: string, opencti_id: string|null, status: 'success'|'partial'|'error' }
